title: phyllostegia rockii
intro: Phyllostegia rockii, also known as Rock's phyllostegia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Hawaiian Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia rockii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Phyllostegia rockii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
